evals.expected_output: Skill reads proof/SKILL.md, asks for confirmation, runs validation and packaging, updates GitHub release asset, calls update_skill and publish_skill on Agentman, and outputs a step-by-step confirmation summary. No save_skill_resource calls since proof has no auxiliary files.
expectations: The transcript shows a Read of ~/.claude/skills/proof/SKILL.md before any other action
The transcript shows a confirmation prompt to the user before running validation or packaging
The transcript shows the validation script being run via Bash
The transcript shows the package script being run via Bash
The transcript shows a Bash command checking for a GitHub remote
The transcript shows update_skill being called with slug 'proof' and the full SKILL.md content
The transcript does NOT show any save_skill_resource calls (proof has no auxiliary files)
The transcript shows publish_skill being called after update_skill
The final output includes a step-by-step summary with status for each action taken

evals.prompt: I updated my create-skill, push the changes
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers from natural language, resolves to create-skill, reads SKILL.md, asks for confirmation, runs validation and packaging, updates GitHub, calls update_skill then save_skill_resource for each file in references/, scripts/, and agents/, then calls publish_skill. Summary reports N auxiliary files synced.
expectations: The skill triggers from the natural language phrase 'push the changes' without the user naming publish-skill explicitly
The transcript shows a Read of ~/.claude/skills/create-skill/SKILL.md
The transcript shows the skill detecting auxiliary files in at least two of: references/, scripts/, agents/
The transcript shows update_skill being called with slug 'create-skill'
The transcript shows save_skill_resource being called at least once for an auxiliary file
The transcript shows publish_skill being called after update_skill and all save_skill_resource calls
The final summary reports the number of auxiliary files synced to Agentman

evals.expected_output: Skill attempts to find ~/.claude/skills/ghost-skill/SKILL.md, fails, and asks the user for the path. Does not proceed to validation, packaging, GitHub, or Agentman steps.
expectations: The transcript shows the skill attempting to locate ~/.claude/skills/ghost-skill/SKILL.md or similar path
The transcript does NOT show the validation script being run
The transcript does NOT show the package script being run
The transcript does NOT show any GitHub commands being executed
The transcript does NOT show update_skill or save_skill_resource being called
The skill asks the user to provide the path rather than erroring out or proceeding
